description: Advanced circle constructions: diameter-based circles, styled circles with color and fill, and circle intersection.
utility: Construct circles from diameter endpoints, apply styling, or find circle intersections

alternates.description: Circle with P1 and P2 as diameter endpoints

examples.scenario: Circle from diameter endpoints joining two known points (circle from a diameter lesson)
examples.expression: circle_1 = circle(graph_1, point_1, point_2, type(diameter), c(mediumvioletred),notes("the diameter defines the circle completely"))

examples.scenario: Circle with center and radius with color and fill (equation of a circle lesson)
Circle from diameter using axis intercept points (axis intercepts lesson)
examples.expression: circle_1 = circle(graph_1, point_3, point_5, type(diameter), c(mediumvioletred),notes("A and B are the diameter endpoints"))

examples.scenario: Circle from general equation for examining point position
